name: Kailinn
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Maelstrom Champion
factionTrait.text: A maelstrom moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy follower.

uniqueTraits.name: Centaur
uniqueTraits.text: Kailinn cannot enter objective hexes. During her activation she may enter small followers hexes. If she ends her movement on a hex containing small followers, move each small follower into an adjacent hex.

ultimate.name: Impaling Horn
ultimate.text: Move Kailinn up to 1 hex. Then you may choose an enemy follower within range to gain wounds until it is knocked out. You move the turn token an extra +2 steps instead of the usual maelstrom bonus for this knock out.

plotSkills.name: Powerful Leap
plotSkills.text: Place Kailinn on a hex up to 2 hexes from her current hex.

plotSkills.name: Thundering Hooves
plotSkills.text: Move Kailinn up to 1 hex. Then move one friendly champion within range up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Brutal Charge
clashSkills.text: If Kailinn made an advance action this activation, Brutal Charge is a bonus action.

clashSkills.name: Flashing Blade
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to two followers that are in different hexes.

traits.name: Harmonious
traits.text: Immediately after a Virtue uses a skill, the other Virtue may use the same skill as part of the same action.

plotSkills.name: Patience
plotSkills.text: If Kailinn is within range, she gains a boon of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Compassion
plotSkills.text: Move this Virtue up to 1 hex. Then move one friendly follower within range up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Serenity
clashSkills.text: You may move this Virtue up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Justice
clashSkills.text: If the Virtues made an advance action this activation, Justice has +1 {damage}.
